title: The Palace Summons the Crew
description: On pages 13–15, this part follows Narrator, Pappag, Unknown person #1, Madam Shyarly, Luffy, Nami, Chopper. The core story beat is the palace summons the crew.
scene: The scene centers on the palace summons the crew, with Narrator, Pappag, Unknown person #1, Madam Shyarly, Luffy, Nami, Chopper driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now take a look out front - we've arrived in the home of the rich and famous, gyoualley hills!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Uh-huh! That big mansion right in front of us...

dialogue.speaker: Pappag
dialogue.text: ...he owns that?! this little starfish?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's the matter?! Madame Shirley!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This isn't like you...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's terrible... too terrible...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's the Madame from the Mermaid Cafe'...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...we must find him at once...!!! The pirate boy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The boy with the straw hat...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HAA has

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We must chase him from this land!! We have not a moment to lose!!!

dialogue.speaker: Madam Shyarly
dialogue.text: What are you talking about, Madame?! is this another prophecy?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I did not mean to see again... but I felt something, from that boy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I could not help myself...I had to look into the future...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhh! Hi...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's Wrong?! What on Earth did you see...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Madame!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Shir- Ley!!

dialogue.speaker: Madam Shyarly
dialogue.text: Please, let it not be true... let my prophecy be false...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HAA HAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The human with the straw hat...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The boy, straw hat Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: by his hands...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What AAT?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Pika Pika no Mi; Light Man

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hie He no Mi; Lee Man

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aokiji

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Magu Magu no Mi: Magma Man

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Akainu

summary: The Palace Summons the Crew. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
